description: Explore and edit your .codex workspace (config.toml, AGENTS.md, prompts, skill, mcp) in VS Code.
viewContainer.codexWorkspace.title: Codex Workspace
view.core.name: Codex Manager

configuration.title: Codex Workspace
configuration.codexFolder.description: Sync destination folder for Codex Core (AGENTS.md and config.toml).
configuration.maxHistoryCount.descriptio: Maximum number of history items to display (newest first). If not explicitly set, all items are shown.
configuration.incrudeReasoningMessage.de: Include reasoning (chain-of-thought) messages in the history preview.
configuration.pet.appServer.enabled.desc: Enable App Server integration for Codex Pet.
configuration.pet.rateLimitRefreshMinute: Rate limit refresh interval in minutes. Default: 5. Set to 0 to disable automatic refresh.
configuration.pet.scale.description: Pet display scale. Default: 1.0. Set a value between 0.5 and 2.0.
configuration.pet.selectedPetId.descript: ID of the last selected pet.
message.mcpToggleUpdated: Settings updated. Please restart Codex to apply changes.
message.configTomlOrganized: config.toml was organized. Backup saved to {0}.
message.configTomlAlreadyOrganized: config.toml was already organized. Backup saved to {0}.
message.configTomlOrganizeBackupFailed: Could not create a config.toml backup, so the organize operation was cancelled.
message.syncSkipped: Skipped {0} files due to sync errors.
message.agentManagerCanvasHint: Drag from a port and connect the right port to the left port.
message.agentManagerWorkflowDescriptionP: Describe what this workflow is meant to accomplish.
message.agentManagerOutputNamePlaceholde: Name the final artifact or section.
message.agentManagerOutputFormatPlacehol: Explain the expected output format, structure, or template.
message.agentManagerNotesPlaceholder: Add optional notes or delivery constraints.
message.agentManagerAcceptanceCriteriaPl: Describe how the loop decides whether it can stop.
message.agentManagerPurposePlaceholder: Describe what this agent is responsible for.
message.agentManagerInputPlaceholder: List the context, files, or inputs this agent should use.
message.agentManagerExpectedOutputPlaceh: Describe the output this agent should return.
message.agentManagerDoneCriteriaPlacehol: Explain how to judge whether this agent is done.
message.agentManagerOverwritten: [agents.{0}] was overwritten with the disabled definition.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionTransport: Connection type. Use stdio for command based servers, http for URL based servers.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionCommand: Command to launch a stdio MCP server. Leave empty for http servers.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionArgs: Command arguments for stdio servers. Enter one item per line.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionUrl: HTTP MCP server URL. Leave empty for stdio servers.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionEnv: Environment variables passed to the MCP server. Enter key and value pairs.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionHttpHeaders: Static HTTP headers sent to the MCP server. Enter header names and values.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionEnvHttpHead: HTTP header mappings whose values are read from environment variables. Enter header names and environment variable names.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionTools: Per-tool settings. Each row can override enabled and approval_mode for one tool.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionRequired: Whether Codex should treat this MCP server as required.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionStartupTime: Startup timeout in seconds. Use a non-negative number.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionToolTimeout: Tool execution timeout in seconds. Use a non-negative number.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionEnabledTool: Allow only these tools. Enter one tool name per line. Do not combine with Disabled Tools.
message.mcpManagerDescriptionDisabledToo: Disable these tools. Enter one tool name per line. Do not combine with Enabled Tools.
message.mcpValidationServerNameDuplicate: An MCP server with the same name already exists.
message.mcpValidationTransportRequired: Transport must be stdio or http.
message.mcpValidationCommandRequired: Command is required for stdio transport.
message.mcpValidationUrlRequired: URL is required for http transport.
message.mcpValidationTimeoutInvalid: Timeout must be a non-negative number.
message.mcpValidationToolsMutuallyExclus: enabled_tools and disabled_tools cannot be set at the same time.
message.mcpValidationEnvKeyRequired: Env rows with a value must also have a key.
message.mcpValidationEnvKeyInvalid: Env keys must start with a letter or underscore and use only letters, numbers, and underscores.
message.mcpValidationToolNameRequired: Tool rows with settings must also have a tool name.
message.mcpValidationToolApprovalModeInv: Tool approval_mode must be auto, prompt, or approve.
message.chainNoWorkspace: Open a workspace folder to view the AGENTS loading chain.
message.chainPreviewEmpty: Select an item on the left to view details.
message.chainExplainIgnoredPreferred: {0} has higher priority, so this file is not used.
message.chainExplainIgnoredGeneric: A higher-priority candidate exists, so this file is not used.
message.chainExplainProblem: The file exists but could not be read. {0}
message.chainExplainMissingFallback: This fallback candidate is configured but the file does not exist.
message.chainExplainMissingGeneric: This candidate was checked, but the file does not exist.
message.featureFlagDescriptionApps: Enable ChatGPT Apps and connectors support.
message.featureFlagDescriptionBrowserUse: Enable browser automation support in Codex.
message.featureFlagDescriptionCodexHooks: Enable lifecycle hooks from hooks.json or inline [hooks].
message.featureFlagDescriptionHooks: Enable lifecycle hooks from hooks.json or inline [hooks].
message.featureFlagDescriptionFastMode: Enable Fast mode selection and the service_tier = "fast" path.
message.featureFlagDescriptionShellSnaps: Snapshot the shell environment to speed up repeated commands.
message.featureFlagDescriptionUnifiedExe: Use the unified PTY-backed exec tool.
message.featureFlagDescriptionWorkspaceD: Allow Codex to use workspace dependency metadata during task execution.
message.featureFlagDescriptionUndo: Enable undo via per-turn git ghost snapshots.
message.featureFlagDescriptionWebSearch: Legacy toggle. Prefer the top-level web_search setting.
message.featureFlagDescriptionWebSearchC: Legacy toggle that maps to web_search = "cached".
message.featureFlagDescriptionWebSearchR: Legacy toggle that maps to web_search = "live".
message.hooksNoCommand: No command is configured for this handler.
message.hooksNoEntries: No hook entries were found in the active layers.
message.hooksWarningMergedSources: {0} layer has both hooks.json and inline hooks. Codex merges them and warns at startup.
message.hooksWarningFeatureDisabled: Hooks are disabled because features.codex_hooks is false.
message.hooksWarningProjectUntrusted: Project-local hooks are inactive until this workspace is trusted.
message.hooksWarningUnsupportedHandler: Only command hook handlers are currently executed by Codex.
message.historyNoPreview: Select a session card to preview the conversation.
